HGSS.052.0000:
Only those who reach the top will
receive a wonderful move.
HGSS.052.0001:
Sprout Tower was built long ago
as a place for Pokémon training.
HGSS.052.0002:
A BELLSPROUT over 100 feet tall...\f
People say that it became the middle
pillar here.
HGSS.052.0003:
See the pillar shaking?\f
People are training upstairs.
HGSS.052.0004:
A Pokémon statue...\f
It looks very distinguished.
